heading: Definitions
label: 50501 Definitions
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 14165 of Title 42

Short TitleFor short title of , which is classified to this chapter, as the “Rafael Ramos and Wenjian Liu National Blue Alert Act of 2015”, see , set out as a Short Title of 2015 Act note under .Pub. L. 114–12section 1 of Pub. L. 114–12section 10101 of this title

children.heading: Coordinator
children.label: 1 Coordinator
children.text: The term “Coordinator” means the Blue Alert Coordinator of the Department of Justice designated under .section 50503(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the serious injury or death of a law enforcement officer in the line of duty;

children.label: B
children.text: an officer who is missing in connection with the officer’s official duties; or

children.label: C
children.text: an imminent and credible threat that an individual intends to cause the serious injury or death of a law enforcement officer.

children.heading: Blue Alert plan
children.label: 3 Blue Alert plan
children.text: The term “Blue Alert plan” means the plan of a State, unit of local government, or Federal agency participating in the network for the dissemination of information received as a Blue Alert.

children.heading: Law enforcement officer
children.label: 4 Law enforcement officer
children.text: The term “law enforcement officer” shall have the same meaning as in .section 10284 of this title

children.heading: Network
children.label: 5 Network
children.text: The term “network” means the Blue Alert communications network established by the Attorney General under .section 50502 of this title

children.heading: State
children.label: 6 State
children.text: The term “State” means each of the 50 States, the District of Columbia, Puerto Rico, the United States Virgin Islands, Guam, American Samoa, and the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands.
